problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
